description_long: This airplane features a futuristic, angular design with a sharply pointed nose and a wide, delta-shaped fuselage. The wings are swept back and positioned mid-fuselage, each ending in a robust engine nacelle with visible blue exhaust ports. The surface is predominantly dark purple with geometric paneling and subtle metallic highlights, giving it a stealthy, high-tech appearance. The tail section is integrated into the main body, lacking a traditional vertical stabilizer, and instead features small, fin-like extensions. The landing gear appears minimal or retracted, with slender protrusions beneath the engines. The cockpit is seamlessly blended into the forward section, with a blue-tinted canopy that suggests a single, forward-mounted pilot seat.
description: A sleek, angular airplane with a pointed nose, swept mid-mounted wings, and robust engine nacelles, finished in dark purple and blue tones with a high-tech, stealthy look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, wide delta fuselage, and symmetrical engine nacelles with blue exhausts.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated nose, mid-mounted swept wings, and the compact, integrated tail section.
description_view_2: Top view reveals the full delta wing shape, geometric paneling, and the broad, angular body with fin-like tail extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the engine nacelles, swept wings, and the streamlined, finned tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept delta wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle; integrated fin-like extensions at the rear.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the wingtips.
attribute_tail_design: Integrated tail with fin-like extensions, lacking a conventional vertical stabilizer; resembles a tailless or blended wing configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Minimal, possibly retractable gear with slender struts beneath the engines; no traditional wheels visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy seamlessly integrated into the nose section.
